message:
docs: Replace CPython stub TODOs with explanations of why not needed

Metal0 is an AOT compiler - many CPython stdlib modules are replaced by
native Zig implementations or aren't applicable. Updated 1586 stub files
with specific documentation:

Native Zig replacements:
- asyncio → packages/async_runtime/ (native async)
- json → packages/shared/json/ (SIMD-accelerated)
- http → packages/shared/http/h2/ (HTTP/2 client)
- collections → packages/collections/ (native data structures)
- threading/multiprocessing → packages/threading/ (no GIL)
- regex/re → packages/regex/ (native regex)
- compression/zlib/gzip → vendor/libdeflate/
- websocket → packages/websocket/

Not applicable to AOT:
- idlelib, _pyrepl → No REPL in AOT binaries
- pdb, profile → Use native debuggers/profilers
- dis, py_compile → No bytecode in AOT
- importlib → Imports resolved at compile time
- venv, site → AOT binaries are self-contained

Platform handling:
- ctypes → Zig's @cImport for FFI
- _aix/_android/_apple/_ios_support → Zig cross-compilation

Added scripts/update_stub_docs.py for maintaining these docs.
